problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 20 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
